series_metadata.series_title: Ohio Safety Officers College Memorial Fund
series_metadata.series_description: Payment requests, correspondence from parents, students, financial aid officers and high school guidance counselors related to this program.

retention_rules.trigger_event: Paper: correspondence from students, parents and institutions and checks received from institutions in office . audit by Auditor of State is completed and released, . ; Electronic: data entry of student names, Social Securtity Numbers, award amounts and number of terms of eligibility remaining . audit by Auditor of State is completed and released
